description: Template for business entity schemas with standard entity metadata

fields.name: version
fields.doc: Entity version for optimistic locking and change tracking

fields.name: createdAt
fields.doc: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when entity was created

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.doc: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when entity was last updated

fields.name: createdBy
fields.doc: User or service that created this entity

fields.name: updatedBy
fields.doc: User or service that last updated this entity

fields.name: status
fields.doc: Current lifecycle status of the entity

fields.name: tags
fields.doc: Optional tags for categorization and search

ai_prompts.generation: Generate an entity schema for {{EntityName}} with fields: {{field_list}}
ai_prompts.relationships: Add relationship fields to connect {{EntityName}} with {{related_entities}}
ai_prompts.evolution: Evolve this entity schema to add {{new_fields}} while maintaining backward compatibility
